echotutorialcore.hint.no_power.title: Machine Offline
echotutorialcore.hint.no_power.message: No EP input detected. Connect a generator, battery, or cable.

echotutorialcore.hint.toxic_without_filt: Toxic air detected. Filter cartridge not found.
echotutorialcore.hint.radiation_without_: Radiation levels rising. Protective gear not detected.

echotutorialcore.hint.dirty_water_relian: Hydration trend declining. Clean water production recommended.
echotutorialcore.hint.low_hydration_clea: Hydration low. Clean water detected in inventory.
echotutorialcore.hint.unclaimed_reward.m: Mission reward pending. Claim it in the Terminal.
echotutorialcore.hint.schematic_fragment: You have schematic fragments. Research them to unlock recipes.

echotutorialcore.hint.scanner_not_used.m: Scanner available but no recent scans detected.

echotutorialcore.hint.recipe_locked.mess: This recipe is gated by progression or research.
echotutorialcore.hint.repeated_hazard_de: Repeated failure detected in hazard zone. Adjust approach.
echotutorialcore.card.welcome_to_ashfall: You survived the crash. Now survive the world.
echotutorialcore.card.what_now.title: What Now
echotutorialcore.card.what_now.summary: Stuck? Let ECHO-7 suggest your next step.
echotutorialcore.card.signal_leads.title: Signal Leads
echotutorialcore.card.signal_leads.summa: Find survivors, caches, and threats with your scanner.
echotutorialcore.card.lens_basics.title: Lens Basics
echotutorialcore.card.lens_basics.summar: Inspect machines, blocks, and entities in the field.
echotutorialcore.card.holomap_basics.sum: Review routes, markers, and terrain before you move.
echotutorialcore.card.clean_water.title: Clean Water
echotutorialcore.card.clean_water.summar: Clean water is required for safe expeditions.
echotutorialcore.card.toxic_air.title: Toxic Air
echotutorialcore.card.toxic_air.summary: Toxic air damages health over time without protection.
echotutorialcore.card.radiation.title: Radiation
echotutorialcore.card.cryogenic_cold.sum: Extreme cold drains warmth and slows movement.
echotutorialcore.card.power_basics.title: Power Basics
echotutorialcore.card.power_basics.summa: EP is the lifeblood of ECHO infrastructure.
echotutorialcore.card.machine_troublesho: Why is your machine not working?
echotutorialcore.card.reward_inbox.title: Reward Inbox
echotutorialcore.card.reward_inbox.summa: Claim rewards from completed missions and events.
echotutorialcore.card.faction_basics.sum: Survivors have organized into factions. Choose alliances carefully.
echotutorialcore.card.research_basics.su: Unlock recipes, tech, and blueprints with schematic fragments.
echotutorialcore.card.guardian_datacores: Recovered from biome guardians. Turn them in to progress the Nexus route.
echotutorialcore.card.nexus_warning.summ: The Nexus is volatile. Choose your path carefully.
Recipes can be gated by research, missions, or item discovery.
echotutorialcore.card.why_machine_not_wo: Why Is My Machine Not Working?
Machines need power, input, and output space.
echotutorialcore.card.where_do_i_go_next: Let the Terminal and signal leads guide you.
